improvements_submitted.description: Add + and - arithmetic operators for nanosecond offsets
Replace compiled Regex with [GeneratedRegex] source-generated regex
Add 15 new tests: implicit operators, parts constructor, local DateTime, Date property, overflow guards, negative Add*, Equals(object?), T-separator TryParse, Subtract overflow
Add NuGet package cache to CI workflow (actions/cache@v4)

notes: Run 4: 7 open Repo Assist PRs total (#14, #15, #17, #18, #20, #aw_ci_cache2, #aw_unix_helpers). All PR CI runs show action_required — this is a GitHub bot workflow approval issue, not a code failure. The maintainer needs to approve workflow runs for bot-created PRs. Major package upgrades (NUnit 3->4, coverlet 6->10, SDK 17->18) still deferred. Task 6 found no code issues to fix in open PRs — all appear clean, just awaiting review.
